notes: v1.14.44 - dead-code strip: removed the unused baked night-lights webp + plumbing. The GFS fragment shader stopped sampling uNight at the v1.14.33 night-pivot (superseded by the SPECTRUM / Black-Marble point-dust), so the inline TEX_NIGHT base64 webp (~184KB) + all 5 uNight/TEX_NIGHT/texNight references were dead weight. Removed: the TEX_NIGHT base64 line, the GFS uNight uniform declaration, the uNight location lookup, the texNight=mkTex creation, and the TEXTURE1 night bind (texDay stays on TEXTURE0, texClouds on TEXTURE2 - NOT renumbered, unit 1 just goes unused). ~186KB off dct-ios.html (3143KB -> 2957KB). JS/GLSL-only, NO CSS, NO shader behavior change (the shader already ignored uNight). UNCHANGED: warm city dust, cyan hubs, terrain, arcs, rim, sun-killed night base, wordmark, ENTER_ENABLED (still false), service worker. NOTE: distinct from the new phantom-night.webp repo asset (committed separately as a401824, still unreferenced). Gates: grep uNight/TEX_NIGHT/texNight = 0, node --check 3/3 inline + sw.js PASS, four stamps lockstep v1.14.44, cache bumped, CSS <style> braces unchanged 3468/3468, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. RUNTIME-VERIFIED (agent-browser 412x915 DPR3): globe renders IDENTICAL to v1.14.43 - GLSL recompiles clean after the uNight uniform removal (terrain draws, not blank); warm dust + cyan hubs + arcs + rim intact. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone, full close+reopen ONLINE to clear SW cache): globe should look IDENTICAL to v1.14.43 - any visible difference means something else moved, flag it.
